title: Barely Lethal
subTitle: Megan Walsh, a special agent, is curious about teenage life experiences so she fakes her own death and enrols in high school. Soon, she realises the troubles of high school life.

title: Recoil
subTitle: When his family is killed by a notorious gang, Ryan Varett, a former police officer, suits up to seek revenge against the perpetrators.

title: Southpaw
subTitle: After a devastating accident shatters his world, a once-celebrated champion boxer spirals into a destructive abyss. Subsequently, he decides to fight for his daughter and revive his fading career.

title: The Love Laugh Live Show
subTitle: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

title: Snowpiercer
subTitle: New power dynamics emerge amongst the survivors of the second ice age when they board a train travelling across the globe.

title: The Big Bang
subTitle: A private detective strives to find a missing stripper, but everyone he questions end up dead. This soon brings him in contact with an odd billionaire who wants to recreate the Big Bang.

title: Sherlock Holmes: A Game of Shadows
subTitle: While investigating a string of crimes in Europe, Sherlock Holmes is led to Professor Moriarty. Determined to foil his evil plans, Sherlock and Dr Watson pursue him across the continent.

title: Kung Fu Yoga
subTitle: An archeology expert joins an Indian professor to look for a lost treasure of India. However, things take a dangerous turn when they are ambushed in their quest.

title: Top Gun: Maverick
subTitle: After 30 years of service, Maverick mentors a troop of elite Top Gun alumni for an esteemed mission while battling his demons from the past.

title: Godzilla
subTitle: When Ford and his father uncover proof of monstrous creatures, the world is thrust into chaos when they rise from the deep. However, an ancient titan, Godzilla, awakens to restore balance.

title: Wonder Woman
subTitle: Princess Diana of an all-female Amazonian race rescues US pilot Steve. Upon learning of a war, she ventures into the world of men to stop Ares, the god of war, from destroying mankind.

title: Vehicle 19
subTitle: Michael Woods, a traveller and a parolee, picks up the wrong rental car to meet his wife which makes him the prime target of a group of corrupt police officers.

title: Final Score
subTitle: When two terrorists kidnap former soldier Michael Knox's niece, he employs all of his skills to rescue her and possibly foil a plan of mass destruction as well.

title: Rocky II
subTitle: Rocky struggles in family life after his bout with Apollo Creed, while the embarrassed champ insistently goads him to accept a challenge for a rematch.

title: The Runner
subTitle: A politician's life is thrown into turmoil when a scandal emerges. His team scrambles to save his reputation and mitigate the damage.

title: The Runner
subTitle: A politician's life is thrown into turmoil when a scandal emerges. His team scrambles to save his reputation and mitigate the damage.

title: Alex Cross
subTitle: While investigating a murder, Alex Cross learns of a ruthless serial killer. However, things soon spiral out of control, leading him on a quest for revenge and uncovering a dark web of conspiracy.

title: Force of Execution
subTitle: A gangster, who seeks to retire from the life of crime, faces a threat when an upcoming rival challenges his authority. He then decides to take help from a trustworthy former apprentice.

title: The Love Laugh Live Show
subTitle: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

title: Recoil
subTitle: When his family is killed by a notorious gang, Ryan Varett, a former police officer, suits up to seek revenge against the perpetrators.

title: Tracers
subTitle: Cam, a bike messenger, is wanted by the Chinese mafia, and he is on the run while learning parkour after crashing into a beautiful woman.

title: Red Dawn
subTitle: A soldier and his brother escape into the woods when their city is invaded by North Korean paratroopers. After their father is killed, the brothers form a guerrilla group to fight back.

title: I Am Wrath
subTitle: After corrupt cops are unable to catch his wife's killers, Stanley, an unemployed man, teams up with an old friend to avenge her death.

title: Escape Plan 2: Hades
subTitle: Security expert Ray Breslin forms a team of skilled personnel after escaping 'The Tomb'. However, when one of his colleagues goes missing, Breslin is forced to revisit the group that imprisoned him.

title: The Starving Games
subTitle: In a deadly game orchestrated by President Snowballs, skilled archer Kantmiss Evershot, her boyfriend Dale and tech-savvy ally Peter Malarkey must rely on their wits and skills to survive.

title: 300: Rise of an Empire
subTitle: Xerxes, seeking revenge for his father's death, declares war on Greece. As a result, Themistocles, the Athenian admiral, is compelled to form an alliance with Sparta to protect Athens.

title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
subTitle: Peter Parker faces Electro and his old friend who is dying and looks out for Spider-Man's blood in order to cure himself.

title: Resident Evil: Extinction
subTitle: During a zombie apocalypse engineered by the Umbrella Corporation, Alice and a group of survivors journey across the country in search of supplies and a safe place.

title: The LEGO Movie
subTitle: Emmet, an ordinary individual prophesied to be the Special, is entrusted with the responsibility of saving the Lego world from the cruel ways of Lord Business.

title: The Transporter Refueled
subTitle: Frank Martin, a former mercenary, is hired by a woman and her accomplices to fulfil a contract. Soon, however, he must join forces with them to bring down a Russian crime lord.

title: Creed II
subTitle: In 1985, Ivan Drago killed Apollo Creed in a tragic boxing match. Under the guidance of his trainer Rocky, Apollo's son Adonis confronts Drago's son in an ultimate showdown.

title: Rocky Balboa
subTitle: Rocky Balboa fights champion Mason Dixon in a surprise return. His unexpected comeback inspires many, defying age and odds.

title: Rocky Balboa
subTitle: Rocky Balboa fights champion Mason Dixon in a surprise return. His unexpected comeback inspires many, defying age and odds.

title: City Lights
subTitle: The Tramp falls in love with a girl with visual impairment who sells flowers on the street. He tries to help her gain her eyesight back with the help of a wealthy man.

title: Hunt to Kill
subTitle: Jim Rhodes, a U.S. Border Patrol agent, stays with his rebellious daughter in the mountains of Montana. However, things go south when the father-daughter duo are kidnapped by a crew of gangsters.

title: The Kid
subTitle: After a woman abandons her child, the Tramp finds him and takes him under his wing. As the boy grows up, the Tramp and the boy try to cope with life's trials and tribulations.

title: Lady Bloodfight
subTitle: Jane, an American girl travelling in Hong Kong, gets into a physical altercation with three robbers where she defends herself. A martial artist, who observes the event, trains her for a competition.

title: Sabotage
subTitle: John Wharton, the captain of an elite task force, raids a safe house owned by one of the most lethal drug cartels with his team. Though the mission is successful, death awaits them.

title: No Escape
subTitle: Jack Dwyer and his family move to a country in Southeast Asia. However, a sudden and violent uprising forces them to flee or risk being executed.

title: In the Name of the King: The Last Mission
subTitle: An assassin accepts one final job of abducting the daughters of a royal family. His life turns upside down when he is transported to the middle ages to fight an evil king and his dragon.

title: Final Score
subTitle: When two terrorists kidnap former soldier Michael Knox's niece, he employs all of his skills to rescue her and possibly foil a plan of mass destruction as well.

title: Kung Fu Yoga
subTitle: An archeology expert joins an Indian professor to look for a lost treasure of India. However, things take a dangerous turn when they are ambushed in their quest.

title: Modern Times
subTitle: A factory production line worker is thrown out on the street for his manic behaviour. He then meets a young, homeless girl, who is recently orphaned, and tries to build a home with her.

title: Now You See Me
subTitle: Four talented magicians are plucked from obscurity to become the Four Horsemen - a group of stage illusionists who soon attract the attention of the FBI.
